title: CBOR tag 42601 — A metadata binding. The elements of the array are defined i…
summary: CBOR tag 42601 (data item: array): A metadata binding. The elements of the array are defined in AdatP-4778.8. The tag is also used as part of the magic number in on-disk detached and encapsulating bindings..
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Thu, 02 Apr 2026 23:51:20 GMT

raw_columns.Semantics: A metadata binding. The elements of the array are defined in AdatP-4778.8. The tag is also used as part of the magic number in on-disk detached and encapsulating bindings.
